turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good morning. I'd like to reschedule. I booked a neurology appointment for next Monday but I have an exam that day now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! No problem. Name and registered number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found it — Shruti Kulkarni, Monday 11 AM with Dr. Leena Verma. Best of luck with your exam! When would you like to reschedule?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Maybe the following week? Wednesday or Thursday?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Verma has Wednesday at 2 PM and Thursday at 4 PM available the following week.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: All set! Rescheduled to the following Wednesday at 2 PM. SMS coming your way. Good luck again!
